about.subtitle: At Mentoro, we believe education shouldn't just be consumed - it should be experienced. The tools we build empower the next generation of digital pioneers.
about.mission_desc: To be the world's most accessible high-fidelity education system, regardless of geographical or financial barriers
about.values_subtitle: We implement these principles in every line of code and every lesson we create.
about.value1_desc: We don't settle for average. Our content is verified by industry experts.
about.value2_desc: Transparency is our default setting. We tell the truth about what you can achieve.
about.value3_desc: You're not just a student; you're part of a global collective of creators.
about.value4_desc: We care deeply about human potential and the impact of quality education.

how_it_works.subtitle: Everything you need to master coding, design, and software engineering.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Browse our expert-curated curriculum of programming, AI, and design courses.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Watch high-definition videos, complete hands-on coding assignments, and take quizzes.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Earn industry-recognized certificates to showcase your skills to employers worldwide.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Use your new skills to land top jobs in tech, get promoted, and increase your earnings.
how_it_works.cta_title: Ready to master a new skill?
how_it_works.feature1_desc: Your logo, your colors, your domain. It's your academy.
how_it_works.feature2_desc: Integrate with Stripe, PayPal, and more for instant payouts.
how_it_works.feature3_desc: Build engaged communities with built-in discussion forums.

seo.home_description: Master new skills with our expert-led online courses. From web development to data science, start your learning journey with Mentoro today.
seo.courses_title: All Courses | Mentoro - Explore Expert-Led Programs

seo.about_title: About Us | Mentoro - Empowering Learners Globally
seo.about_description: Learn more about Mentoro's mission to provide world-class education. Discover our values and how we're transforming online learning.
seo.contact_title: Contact Us | Mentoro - Get in Touch
seo.contact_description: Have questions or need support? Contact the Mentoro team. We're here to help you on your learning journey.

faq.subtitle: Find answers about course access, certificates, and learning paths
faq.q1: How do I get started on Mentoro?
faq.a1: Sign up for an account, explore our course library, and enroll in any course that interests you. You can start learning instantly.
faq.q2: Are the courses self-paced or live?
faq.a2: We offer both. Most courses are self-paced so you can learn at your own speed, along with live sessions and workshops led by industry experts.
faq.q3: Will I get a certificate after completing a course?
faq.a3: Yes, you will receive a digital certificate after successfully completing a course. You can share it on LinkedIn or with potential employers.
faq.q4: Can I become an instructor on Mentoro?
faq.a4: Yes, you can. If you have expertise in a subject, you can apply to be an instructor from your dashboard and start teaching.
faq.a5: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on most courses. If you're not satisfied, you can request a refund within 30 days of purchase.

careers.subtitle: We're looking for thinkers, makers, and dreamers who want to redefine how the world shares knowledge. Join a remote-first team building the most premium LMS on the planet.
careers.culture1_desc: We're scaling fast. You'll have the autonomy to own projects from day one and see your impact instantly.
careers.culture2_desc: Work from anywhere. We value results over hours spent in an office. Our team spans across multiple timezones.
careers.culture3_desc: Learn from the best. We provide a learning budget for every employee to ensure you never stop growing.
careers.positions_subtitle: Find your next role in education technology
careers.no_positions: No open positions in this category right now.
careers.perks_subtitle: We believe in taking care of our people so they can take care of our students. Our benefits are designed to support your life, not just your work.
careers.testimonial_text: "Joining Mentoro was the best career move I ever made. The culture of thinking and innovation is real."
careers.no_role_desc: We're always looking for exceptional talent. If you're passionate about education and technology, we want to hear from you.

privacy_policy.subtitle: Last updated: April 13, 2026. We believe transparency is the foundation of trust. Here's how we protect your digital footprint.
privacy_policy.section1_desc: We collect information that helps us provide a premium learning experience. This includes account details (name, email), profile information, and learning progress. We never collect sensitive personal data without your explicit consent.
privacy_policy.section2_desc: Your data is used to personalize your curriculum, process transactions securely via our payment partners, and send important platform updates. We analyze anonymous usage patterns to constantly refine our interface and content quality.
privacy_policy.section3_desc: Mentoro employs industry-leading encryption and decentralized security protocols to ensure your data remains inaccessible to unauthorized parties. All payment processing is handled by Level 1 PCI-compliant service providers.
privacy_policy.section4_desc: You retain full ownership of your data. At any time, you can request a full export of your personal information or ask for permanent account deletion. We honor all GDPR and CCPA requests with immediate priority.

terms_of_service.subtitle: Effective as of April 13, 2026. By accessing Mentoro, you agree to these professional standards and legal obligations.
terms_of_service.section1_desc: By creating an account on Mentoro, you enter into a legally binding agreement. You certify that you are at least 18 years of age (or have legal guardian consent) and will provide accurate registration information.
terms_of_service.section2_desc: We grant you a limited, non-transferable, personal license to access and view course content for which you have paid all required fees. This license is for personal, non-commercial educational use only.
terms_of_service.section3_desc: All content provided on the platform—including videos, transcripts, and downloadable assets—remains the exclusive property of Mentoro or its instructors. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is strictly prohibited.
terms_of_service.section4_desc: Users must maintain a professional and respectful environment. Any form of harassment, hate speech, or attempt to compromise platform security will result in immediate termination of access without refund.

refund_policy.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your investment. Here's a clear breakdown of our fair refund process.
refund_policy.feature1_desc: Request a full refund within 14 days of your purchase date, no questions asked if eligibility is met.
refund_policy.feature2_desc: To prevent abuse, refunds are only available if you've consumed less than 20% of the course content.
refund_policy.feature3_desc: Course material downloads or resource access voids the refund eligibility to protect our intellectual property.
refund_policy.standards_desc: Our refund policy is designed to balance student satisfaction with the protection of our instructor's hard work. We process all valid requests within 3-5 business days.
refund_policy.list_item2: Funds returned to the original payment method
refund_policy.list_item3: Promotional bundles may have specific terms
refund_policy.list_item4: Lifetime access remains until refund is processed
refund_policy.request_subtitle: Please follow these steps for a swift resolution.
refund_policy.step1: Prepare your purchase receipt or order ID from your confirmation email.
refund_policy.step2: Compose an email to our support team with a brief explanation of the request.

cookie_policy.subtitle: We use cookies to enhance your journey through our academy. Learn how we use them and how you can control your preferences.
cookie_policy.card1_desc: Required for core platform functionality like authentication, security, and session management. These cannot be disabled.
cookie_policy.card2_desc: Allow us to remember your language choices, theme settings, and regional preferences for a consistent experience.
cookie_policy.card3_desc: Help us understand how you interact with our courses so we can improve content delivery and platform performance.
cookie_policy.card4_desc: Used to track the effectiveness of our outreach campaigns and provide relevant news about upcoming course launches.
cookie_policy.manage_desc: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings preferences. However, if you limit the ability of websites to set cookies, you may worsen your overall user experience, since it will no longer be personalized.
